Surname.en: Armed Librarian of the Magic Academy
Surname.zh: 魔法学院的武装图书管理员

dungeon.jp: 飛天の塔【ベリーハード】3階

description.en: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to grant increased <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>回避</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>回避</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

name.jp: 帽子屋さんのティーカップ

description.en: When using this skill, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from all enemies, and attacks all enemies.\nAfter attacking, inflicts reduced <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>, and for each target damaged, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>25%</color>.
description.kr: 스킬 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제하고 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>을 감소시키고, 피해를 준 대상마다 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 증가합니다.
description.jp: スキル使用時、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除し、敵全体にダメージを与える。\n攻撃後、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせ、ダメージを与えた対象の数に応じて自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>UPさせる。
description.zh: 使用技能时,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率解除全体敌人的\n<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>,并攻击全体敌人。\n攻击后,使全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,且每对1个目标造成伤害,自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>。

name.jp: アリス・イン・ワンダーランド

description.en: Attacks all enemies, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unbuffable</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>강화 불가</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>強化不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>无法强化</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。

name.jp: 魔法使いのおすすめ書

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nAt the start of battle, grants an irremovable <color=#28d9ed>reduced damage taken</color> to all allies for 3 turns. Additionally, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> and grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Buff Enhancement</color> for 1 turn.\nTakes Weakness Gauge damage only when hit by a counterattack.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n전투 시작 시 아군 전체에게 3턴 동안 해제되지 않는 <color=#28d9ed>피해 감소</color>를 부여합니다. 추가로 자신은 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 증가하고, 1턴 동안 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>증가 ,<color=#28d9ed>강화 촉진</color> 효과를 부여합니다.\n반격으로 피격 시에만 WG 피해를 받습니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦闘開始時、味方全体に解除不可能な<color=#28d9ed>ダメージDOWN</color>効果を3ターンの間付与する。また、自分は<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPし、自分に<color=#28d9ed>会心率UP</color>、<color=#28d9ed>強化促進</color>を1ターンの間付与する。\n反撃のダメージでのみWGダメージを受ける。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n战斗开始时,全体友军获得无法被解除的<color=#28d9ed>伤害降低</color>效果,持续3回合。自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>额外提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>,并获得<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升、<color=#28d9ed>强化促进</color>效果,持续1回合。\n仅在受到反击时,受到WG伤害。

description.en: Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> every 5 turns, and increases Attack and Speed by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>. This effect lasts until the caster is inflicted with Break.\n\n<color=#28d9ed>Enraged Ultimate Skill</color>: Recovers Weakness Gauge by 30%, and deals lethal damage to all enemies. This Enraged has no duration.
description.kr: 5턴마다 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환하고, 공격력과 속도가 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 증가합니다. 브레이크 되기 전까지 효과가 유지됩니다. \n\n<color=#28d9ed>광폭화 돌입과 필살기</color> : WG 30%를 회복하고, 적 전체에게 치명적인 피해를 입힙니다. 광폭화 유지 시간은 없습니다.
description.jp: 5ターンごとに<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わり、攻撃力とスピードが<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>UPする。この効果はブレイクすると解除される。\n\n<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】と【必殺スキル】</color>:WGを30%回復し、敵全体に致命的なダメージを与える。【狂暴化】の持続ターンはない。
description.zh: 每5回合转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态,并使攻击力和速度提升<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>,效果将持续至进入力竭状态为止。\n\n<color=#28d9ed>陷入狂暴化和必杀技</color>:WG恢复30%,对全体敌人造成致命伤害。因陷入狂暴化而触发该技能后,狂暴化状态立即解除。
